response:
here's a cover letter without any capitalization:

---

dear hiring manager,

i am writing to express my strong interest in the [position] role at [company name]. with my background in [field/skill], i am confident that i would be a valuable addition to your team.

throughout my career, i have developed skills in [skill 1], [skill 2], and [skill 3]. in my previous role at [previous company], i was able to [achievement or responsibility], which resulted in [positive outcome]. i take pride in my ability to [relevant quality or strength], and i am always looking for ways to grow and improve.

what excites me most about [company name] is [specific reason — culture, mission, product, etc.]. i believe my values align closely with yours, and i am eager to contribute to the work you are doing.

i would love the opportunity to discuss how my experience and skills can benefit your team. thank you so much for your time and consideration. i look forward to hearing from you.

warm regards,
[your name]
[your email]
[your phone number]

---

want me to tailor it to a specific job or industry?
